His only option is major surgery, which could be dangerous at his age. A woman whose boyfriend was killed in a cycling accident a year previously is also injured while on her bike, and a medical technician and a mobile caterer talk about their roles in aiding people to recovery

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team explore the snacks aisle. Kate Quilton visits Kenya to find out how many mangoes are in a snack pack, Helen Lawal learns the mystery of the fluffy centre of a snowball, John Whaite cracks open the secret of caramel popcorn, and Andi Oliver investigates what a supermarket aisle means when youre shopping online

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their tour of the Scottish Highlands, Sean and Marie, Jen, Ian and Ellis, and Simon and Emmy pitch up at Ben Nevis Holiday Park, at the foot of the famous landmark

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien discover items including stained glass and a Victorian hay rack that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In Mijas Costa, Leah Charles-King helps Susan and Terry, a couple who love this part of southern Spain so much they are eager to find their forever home, where they can settle down and enjoy visits from the family. They give Leah a budget of £120,000 to find them a two-bedroom property near the beach with some outside space, so the presenter sets about lining up five options to show them

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Joining her are tough-talking prison transport officer Tina, dreadlocked farm-dweller Stephen, superior IT manager David and glamorous beauty-school teacher Ashleigh. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty teacher Ashleigh throws the second of the weeks parties in Co Durham, she hopes a menu of sophisticated dishes - along with a helping of hearts and love - will help her win the cash prize. However, cracks were already beginning to show in the diners genial facade yesterday, and the hostess realises she must play peacemaker if she is to keep everyone from falling out

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Call centre complaints officer and part-time farmer Stephen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham. He hopes to win the £1,000 prize money by impressing his guests with an evening on his farm, featuring a drinks reception and rustic cuisine. However, self-confessed snob Tina makes it perfectly clear what she thinks of his efforts

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Prison transport officer Tina is the fourth host in Co Durham. She hopes to impress her guests with a sophisticated French menu including salmon crepes, chicken and posh peas and pear dessert. But having been highly critical of everyone elses food so far, will they now take the chance to get their own back or can she win them round?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final evening of gatherings in Co Durham sees IT manager David stage a French-themed soiree in the hope of securing the £1,000 prize. However, he soon finds his main challenge is to keep all his guests on friendly terms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where for owners Ronnie and Steph Caird, its all about keeping it in the family. When the guests arrive, design-conscious father and son Steve and Allard take a trip back in time, and John isnt flushed with praise for his bathroom. At dinner, John reveals his culinary background, piling on the pressure for Ronnie to deliver a good breakfast. Fiona and Shaunas sizeable confession raises eyebrows, while in the morning, Ronnie has a breakfast to forget and the bathroom blues leave Ronnie and Steph seeking answers from their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Ingliston Country Club in Renfrewshire, where events manager Shauna Kirk and sales manager Fiona Gallagher prove a force to be reckoned with. Guests Steve and Allard arent feeling the dated decor, and John proves that one size doesnt fit all. Ronnie and Steph are blown away by the competition, but they think that perfection comes at a price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit, the group heads to 1692 Wasdale in the Lake District, where owners Steve and Allard Newell have proudly built their BandB from the ground up

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay at the Lynbar Hotel in Blackpool, where Ronnie and Steph have parking problems, while confident owner John ODonnell boasts of serving the best breakfast in town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Inn at the Park owners Ronnie and Steph Caird are intent on clearing up Johns issues with the toilet

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend visit Plymouth to rescue a 25-year-old example of the worlds bestselling two-seater sports car - the Mazda MX5. The particular motor belongs to former ambulance driver Paul and has been off the road for some time. With a 90s Japanese sports car in the workshop, Tim cant let the chance to try out a few modifications go by

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a 1991 Range Rover, which is a sad reminder of happier days for the owner and her family

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Life at Animal Welfare League NSW. Following a terrible ordeal, the team hope that neo-mastiff cross Goobers drool wont be too much for Scott and Adelaide, while Mary and Danielle try to heal Cokes broken heart. Plus, Paul and Samuel battle between small and big dogs

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Furniture-maker Lucinda sets out to build a two-storey, highly insulated home entirely out of wood in the woodland near her old family home in South Herefordshire. She enlists the help of her children Dan and Rosie, who grew up learning her craft, to help her £150,000 budget stretch as far as possible

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An ambitious couple set out to build a revolutionary eco home in the Cotswolds, which will not only use very little energy, it will also produce four times the energy it needs. Environmental consultant Duncan is planning to manage the project himself, moving out of the London home he shares with solicitor Liz to live near the site. But although he is totally committed, he has never faced anything like this before, and almost inevitably the technically complex 18-month build, while living apart takes its toll on the couple

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The nights most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from a GP surgery for a child suffering a severe asthma attack and paramedics are called out to a young woman with multiple sclerosis who is in considerable pain. A man with advanced bowel cancer who is struggling to breathe is seen to by a district nurse so as to avoid a visit to AandE. Plus, a patient is having their 10th nosebleed in 11 days

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Calls to the ambulance service reach new heights in the early hours of Saturday morning as the clubs start to empty. A young woman is found intoxicated by the side of the road and an amateur boxer has vomited in his sleep and is difficult to rouse after losing a fight. Paramedics are called for a woman who has gone into premature labour at 32 weeks

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The nights most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE staff of Kings College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In search of the secret to the bubbles in bubble tea, Kate Quilton visits a cassava farm in Kenya to get to the root of it. Jimmy Doherty is in Somerset exploring why sour milk is sneered at, though soured cream is revered. Plus, Helen Lawal reports from Portugal on canned fish

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers arrive at Dalraddy Holiday Park on a traditional Scottish estate at Aviemore. Without leaving the site, campers Jen, Ian and Ellis, Sean and Marie, and Emmy and Simon take a train ride, enjoy some quirky Highland games and battle it out on the paintballing field

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Gill and Paul, a couple from Derbyshire who are searching for a holiday home in Benalmádena on Spains Costa del Sol, on a £110,000 budget. It has been Gills dream for at least 30 years to have a place that she can escape to during the cold, winter months

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five strangers from in and around the Hampshire town of Basingstoke compete to host the best dinner party. Marketing manager and maths enthusiast Nicole is first up with a foodie journey that takes her guests from Lebanon back to the UK via the Caribbean. Will company director Adam, winery worker Izzy, DJ, poet and business owner Mark and cleaning company owner Chris be inpressed by their hosts efforts?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host from in and around Basingstoke, business owner Adam, hopes to impress his guests with authentic Mexican cuisine, inspired by a holiday to a resort in Cancún

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in Basingstoke, DJ and nutritionist Mark goes down the festival route with both his food and the entertainment, and offers his guests his own filtered water

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Basingstoke finds winery worker Izzy planning a sophisticated evening, though whether her fancy approach will prove too much of a risk remains to be seen. DJ and nutritionist Mark irritates Izzy by not sticking to her dress code, while Adam and Chris embrace the black-tie event. Will the self-confessed queen of dinner parties give the guests a night to remember and put herself in the top spot, or will the sophistication be too much for some?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host from in and around the Hampshire town of Basingstoke is snappy dresser Chris, who hopes to impress his guests with a 90s music dress code and a menu of French dishes made with local produce. Chris has been disappointed with the standard of cooking all week and plans to take it up a notch for the final night, but theres simmering tensions between Mark and well-spoken Izzy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts in Pencader, Carmarthenshire, at the School House BandB, owned by eco-friendly married couple Jayne and Ian Hall-Edwards, who hope that their environmental approach will impress their guests. At dinner, Ian reveals that his hosting skills might not be up to scratch and eyebrows are raised at straight-talking colleagues Jo and Neil. At breakfast, assumptions are made of businessman Raj

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Cathedral 73 in Cardiff, managed by Neil Chidzey. On arrival, guests are wowed by the glamorous rooms, but Raj is shocked to find breakfast is not included

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Leafy Suburban BandB in Northwood, Hertfordshire, where the guests spend the afternoon taking a swing at some golfing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to the Wellington Inn, Hertfordshire, where Felicity Rainbow takes a spiritual approach, cleansing the aura of the rooms and encouraging guests to feel the vibe

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. The School House BandB is first and host Jayne Hall-Edwards takes guests back to basics over her green policy. Next, Neil Chidzey and Jo Goodwin from Cathedral 73 challenge their guests over costings

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from the documentary set inside Woodgreen animal charity, including a couple having to choose between a French bulldog and a nervous terrier, a jack russell finding a family that need a dog able to keep up with them, and a dog offering to pull his prospective owners wheelchair along

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Australian shepherd Alfie and the Holmes family are on track to make a new bond, while Missys attachment issues could be too much for a first-time owner

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents more live coverage from the 122nd edition of Crufts from the National Exhibition Centre in Birmingham, including the first Agility final in the Main Arena, and the Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, all the news from the NECs halls. Ellie Simmonds selects her breed of the day, and resident vet Dr Paul Manktelow answers questions about best practices for dog lovers

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many developers face in a very different world. In this episode, the duo tackle future-proofing, as in Clifford in West Yorkshire, Vic and Paul Miller need help with their idyllic property, as do the Lindleys from Ashtead in Surrey

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets retired racehorse breeder John and his wife Helen in Dunstable. The couple met at Newbury races in 2005 and wed two years later, living in a 17th-century farmhouse until illness struck in 2018. Helen had a stroke, severely affecting her mobility and leaving her with aphasia, which affects her ability to communicate. With his wife constrained by the steep stairs, narrow doorways and changes in level of their current home, John resolved to make a big change by purchasing a nearby two-acre plot. Following the demolition of an old, dilapidated house on site, a new hi-tech accessible pavilion, complete with wildlife garden, will be built in its place for £1.3million

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: A couple throw open their home to local dealers, only to discover they may have blown thousands on fake designer furniture. However, one item could be worth millions. Sisters Amy and Laura return to see if their inherited royal relics will fund a family holiday, and a woman grieving the loss of her parents is finally ready to part with their silver heirlooms

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A retired dockworker who suffers from diabetes is brought in with severe stomach pain and doctors believe part of his gut may have permanently stopped working, creating a life-threatening situation where immediate surgery is the only option. Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Furniture-maker Lucinda sets out to build a two-storey, highly insulated home entirely out of wood in the woodland near her old family home in South Herefordshire. She enlists the help of her children Dan and Rosie, who grew up learning her craft, to help her £150,000 budget stretch as far as possible

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An ambitious couple set out to build a revolutionary eco home in the Cotswolds, which will not only use very little energy, it will also produce four times the energy it needs. Environmental consultant Duncan is planning to manage the project himself, moving out of the London home he shares with solicitor Liz to live near the site. But although he is totally committed, he has never faced anything like this before, and almost inevitably the technically complex 18-month build, while living apart takes its toll on the couple

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The nights most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from a GP surgery for a child suffering a severe asthma attack and paramedics are called out to a young woman with multiple sclerosis who is in considerable pain. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Calls to the ambulance service reach new heights in the early hours of Saturday morning as the clubs start to empty. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets retired racehorse breeder John and his wife Helen in Dunstable. Helen had a stroke, severely affecting her mobility and leaving her with aphasia, which affects her ability to communicate. With his wife constrained by the steep stairs, narrow doorways and changes in level of their current home, John resolved to make a big change by purchasing a nearby two-acre plot. programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dramatised documentary recounting the life of the iconic Egyptian ruler. By the age of 21, Cleopatra had already seen her sister killed by their own father. She became queen of Egypt before escaping almost certain death. Outcast from the royal family and knowing she had nothing to lose, so set about seducing Julius Caesar to ensure the survival of both her dynasty and Egypt itself

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.sub-title: And I Will Make Them One Nation
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines the history of the Stuarts, who grappled with the chaos of three separate kingdoms, multiple religions and civil war during the 17th century. In the opening episode, she looks at James VI of Scotlands attempts to unite his country with England and Ireland and persuade his subjects to feel more British

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: Hitlers Nazi empire is in ruins, but there is still one city to take before the allies can declare victory. But as the British, Americans and Soviets close in on Berlin, new questions about the post-war world start to emerge. Who will rule Europe? And who will take the glory of ending the war?

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dramatised documentary revealing the story of the iconic Egyptian rulers fall from grace in Egypt after the death of Julius Caesar. Plus, how Cleopatra tried to win the heart of Mark Antony, which turned out to be a fatal decision

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Joann Fletcher looks at the lives of ordinary Egyptian citizens 3,500 years ago. In the first of two programmes, she explores the conditions of their tightly packed houses, how they dressed and what they ate. Joann also examines their love of poetry, their enthusiasm for interior design and what it was like to work in the Valley of the Kings, where the pharaohs were entombed

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: After Charles Is disastrous attempt to impose political and religious uniformity throughout England, Scotland and Ireland, both the Stuart dynasty and its three kingdoms fell into an abyss. In this episode, Dr Clare Jackson reveals how the unprecedented religious violence of the Wars of the Three Kingdoms shaped British political culture and subsequent constitutional crises

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: As relentless firebombing and blockade of war-ravaged Japan shows no sign of securing a surrender, the US reluctantly prepares to invade. First, they need Okinawa, an island close to the mainland, as a base to stage their attack. The Marines fear the worst - but their amphibious invasion is met with almost total silence. Lulled into a false sense of security, its just the calm before the storm

programme.title: Cleopatra: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: Following the discovery of a skeleton that archaeologists believe to be the sister of Cleopatra VII, Neil Oliver examines the reign of the ruthless queen. On a journey taking him from Egypt to Turkey, he unravels the story behind the monarchs lust for power and the possible cause of her siblings death

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Part two of two. Joann Fletcher investigates the Ancient Egyptian attitude to death, revealing that to them life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife that they were trying to reach. Joann clambers into rarely visited tombs, explores a treasure trove of long-buried objects and examines mummies to discover just why they spent a fortune preparing for death - and what they hoped to find when they got there

programme.desc: Only seven pounds separates antiques experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram as they set off in Cheshire heading to their final auction in Somerset. programme.desc: Mechanical expert Steve Fletcher takes on an ornate but broken clock, while metal expert Dominic Chinea tries to rejuvenate a toy carriage dating from 1911. programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus clears the family home of TV icon Anneka Rice and looks at a collection of quirky items at soap star Antony Cottons Lancashire cottage

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Growing up, Barbara Jacobs always believed that she was one of three children. It was not until she reached her twenties that she made a discovery which would change her life. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell investigate Barbaras story, and also Sharon Heartes. She was mixed race child adopted by a white family who grew up in the West Midlands. Sharon knew her birth mother, Barbara, was a white woman who worked in a Smethwick bicycle factory, and her father was from Jamaica. She wants to track down her mother to tell her that she understands why she was given up for adoption

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Angela Brennan believed she was adopted, but at 18 her mother revealed she had an older sister, also called Angela, who had been put up for adoption by her parents. Cameras follow Angelas search for her namesake sibling. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also examine the story of Bronwen Hook. When her son, Mark, was born, she did her best to raise him, but Bronwen found being responsible for a baby hard, and gave him up for adoption. Shes always hoped she would see Mark again. Will she finally get her chance?

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Julie Roberts, a chocolate factory-worker from Birmingham, has always known she was adopted. She longs to find her mother Marion, to see what impact her teenage pregnancy had and find out what became of her. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also investigate the case of keen biker Marc Wolfe, who knows little about his birth mother, other than that she was Jewish and her one wish was for her son to be adopted into a Jewish family. After the death of his adoptive mother, his feelings intensified and he decided to look for his biological mum. Marc wants to know why she gave him up

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: An extraordinary double search within one family, beginning as sister Maureen looks for her brother Keith to tell him the truth about their father, followed by a further search with Keith to find out more about the birth mother he never knew. programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva returns with a fresh selection of recipes bridging the gap between traditional flavours and modern life. She begins by serving up family favourites chicken katsu curry, teriyaki salmon and banana fritters

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire travels through Ulster, celebrating the great food and culture of the province. He packs his bags in Blacklion, Cavan, and heads into Northern Ireland to visit the famous Marble Arch Caves of Enniskillen, County Fermanagh. In County Monaghan, Neven tours family run Carleton Cakes where Dylan Carleton shows Neven how they bake thousands of cakes every day without sacrificing handmade quality

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: The first in a two-part documentary telling the story of Larry Goodman, Irelands most successful business figure, who emerged through a series of crises and controversies to become an overwhelmingly powerful player in the food industry. The story begins with his rise in the meat industry and the even more dramatic and spectacular crash that brought his empire to the very brink

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Violet considers running for Mayor, but fails to notice that Fred isnt his usual cheery self. Events take a dramatic turn and it looks like her campaign will have to be abandoned. A pregnant model who began her career in infancy makes plans for her child to follow in her footsteps. However, when the child is born, Nurse Crane has to help her cope with a difficult diagnosis. Reggie comes home for a few weeks holiday and helps Fred to make-over the small unkempt green space outside St Oswalds church

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: For the semi finals at Drogheda Port, the remaining six families will become four as they battle it out for a place in the grand final. All families will face a 1km boat race through the centre of Drogheda, and an icy plunge into the river. The two families at the bottom of each heat will compete in the Eliminator

programme.title: Trackers: The People v The Banks
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going behind the headlines to tell the real story of the tracker mortgage scandal through the eyes of the customers most affected

programme.title: Heat My Home
programme.desc: Building engineer Kieran McCarthy meets homeowners attempting to secure energy upgrades on their properties by taking on retrofit challenges

programme.title: Patrick: A Slave to Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Saint Patrick, his mission from Roman Britain to Ireland and how he spread the Christian faith, 1,500 years ago. Featuring re-enactments of the Saints journey, visuals of Ireland, narration from Ciarán Hinds and Ian Hart, as well as historical insights from leading scholars

programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923. Narrated by Brendan Gleeson, the series features extensive film footage, interviews with leading academics, archive interviews with contemporary participants and witnesses and first-hand witness accounts read by actors, all combining to tell one of the most controversial chapters in Irish history

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire travels through Ulster, celebrating the great food and culture of the province. He packs his bags in Blacklion, Cavan, and heads into Northern Ireland to visit the famous Marble Arch Caves of Enniskillen, County Fermanagh. In County Monaghan, Neven tours family run Carleton Cakes where Dylan Carleton shows Neven how they bake thousands of cakes every day without sacrificing handmade quality

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: The first in a two-part documentary telling the story of Larry Goodman, Irelands most successful business figure, who emerged through a series of crises and controversies to become an overwhelmingly powerful player in the food industry. The story begins with his rise in the meat industry and the even more dramatic and spectacular crash that brought his empire to the very brink

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Violet considers running for Mayor, but fails to notice that Fred isnt his usual cheery self. Events take a dramatic turn and it looks like her campaign will have to be abandoned. A pregnant model who began her career in infancy makes plans for her child to follow in her footsteps. However, when the child is born, Nurse Crane has to help her cope with a difficult diagnosis. Reggie comes home for a few weeks holiday and helps Fred to make-over the small unkempt green space outside St Oswalds church

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: For the semi finals at Drogheda Port, the remaining six families will become four as they battle it out for a place in the grand final. All families will face a 1km boat race through the centre of Drogheda, and an icy plunge into the river. The two families at the bottom of each heat will compete in the Eliminator

programme.title: Trackers: The People v The Banks
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going behind the headlines to tell the real story of the tracker mortgage scandal through the eyes of the customers most affected

programme.title: Heat My Home

programme.title: Patrick: A Slave to Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of Saint Patrick, his mission from Roman Britain to Ireland and how he spread the Christian faith, 1,500 years ago. Featuring re-enactments of the Saints journey, visuals of Ireland, narration from Ciarán Hinds and Ian Hart, as well as historical insights from leading scholars

programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923. Narrated by Brendan Gleeson, the series features extensive film footage, interviews with leading academics, archive interviews with contemporary participants and witnesses and first-hand witness accounts read by actors, all combining to tell one of the most controversial chapters in Irish history

Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke and Liam Cunningham

Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: The Last of Us

programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon puts a bounty on Omar for stealing his drug stash and McNulty and Bunk reinvestigate the murder of a woman that may be linked to Barksdales crew. Those caught in the police raid on the low-rises refuse to give up their superiors, and dealer Bodie escapes from juvenile detention. Drama, starring Dominic West and Wood Harris

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Dawns body is discovered, and Jason is suspected of killing her. Hauled in by the police, things look bleak - especially when he realises he still has the vampire blood Lafayette gave him. Initially unsure of her brothers innocence, Sookie decides to visit the Fangtasia vampire bar with Bill to uncover fresh links in the case. Vampire drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Bear and the Maiden Fair
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa frets about her prospects, Tyrions new situation agitates Shae, and Tywin counsels the king. Daenerys exchanges gifts with a slave lord outside Yunkai, Melisandre reveals a secret to Robert Baratheons illegitimate son Gendry, and Brienne faces a formidable foe at Harrenhal. Emilia Clarke and Peter Dinklage star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones

Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke and Liam Cunningham

Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Urban Secrets

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Jules questions Rue and Elliots new friendship. The lines between fantasy and reality begin to blur as Kat ponders her relationship

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: McNulty and Bunk bring DAngelo in for questioning about the murder of the witness who testified against him at his trial. Meanwhile, Detective Greggs informant Bubbles gives her the low-down about the Barksdale crews home turf, before officers Herc, Carver and Prez go there looking for information - but their plan backfires spectacularly. Crime drama, starring Dominic West

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: After saving Sookie from the Rattrays, Bill uses his vampire blood to heal her though she suffers strange side effects. In return, she invites him to her house to meet Jason, Tara and Gran, but he struggles to keep his primal urges under control. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Sam Trammell

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. Meanwhile, Daenerys meets with the slavers as she moves to build an army. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony receives a warning about Phil Leotardos plan to take action against him, prompting the mobster to draft in Paulie to make the first move. However, an innocent family becomes the victim of mistaken identity when the Italians open fire in Queens. Elsewhere, Dr Melfi ends Tonys therapy sessions. Drama, starring James Gandolfini and Frank Vincent

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the crime drama, Tony and Carmela come out of hiding to attend Uncle Bobbys funeral before the mobster and Paulie set out to track down Phil, while Meadow and Patrick plan their wedding. Starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Shiv shows up in search of answers when Kendall and Roman head to the UK to negotiate with their mother. Meanwhile, Greg goes to great lengths to protect himself

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: The entire Roy clan travels to Logans hometown of Dundee for a celebration of Logans 50 years in the business, while Kendall becomes enamoured with Jennifer

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan, Kendall, Gerri and Tom testify before Congress, while Shiv speaks candidly to Kira, a victim who is set to be a key witness. Romans business pitch takes a chilling turn

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan weighs up whether a member of the family, or a top lieutenant, will need to be sacrificed to salvage the companys tarnished reputation. Roman shares his hesitations about a new source of financing, as Kendall suggests a familiar alternative

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As the Roy family are left reeling in the wake of his unexpected public attack on his fathers empire, Kendall plans his next move. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Kendall tries to find more allies in his fight to take over control of Waystar. Meanwhile, Greg turns to his grandfather for help

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: With the Department of Justice breathing down his neck, Logan summons his arsenal. Meanwhile, Tom makes a potentially life altering offer

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan and Kendall have their first meeting together with Josh, a major investor worried about their family feud. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Mare of Easttown
programme.desc: The case takes a devastating turn and Mares family and friends process the fall-out while she attempts to find her own way forward

programme.desc: The department deals with the fallout of the riot in the tower buildings. programme.desc: Bill Comptons allure is diminished when Sookie visits him at home and finds that several other vampires have also dropped by for a visit. Elsewhere, Sam looks for a remedy to his long-term loneliness, and Tara seeks respite from her mothers alcohol-fuelled rage

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: The Hangmans Daughter (2000)
programme.desc: Prequel to the acclaimed horror tale, in which a band of Western outlaws and unfortunate travellers stumble across a remote bar inhabited by suspicious looking characters _ who turn out to be vampires. Marco Leonardi, Michael Parks and Temuera Morrison star

programme.title: Critters (1986)
programme.desc: Murderous alien beasties escape from their space prison and flee to Earth, where they wreak havoc in a sleepy Kansas village as they discover the delights of snacking on human flesh - and only two intergalactic bounty hunters look capable of saving the day. Madcap horror comedy, starring Dee Wallace Stone, M Emmet Walsh, Billy Green Bush and Scott Grimes

programme.title: Wolf Man (2025)
programme.desc: After a family barricade themselves inside their remote farmhouse when a creature attacks, a father slowly transforms into something unrecognisable. Werewolf horror from The Invisible Man director Leigh Whannell, starring Christopher Abbott, Julia Garner, Matilda Firth and Sam Jaeger

programme.title: Until Dawn (2025)
programme.desc: A year after their friend disappeared, a group find themselves trapped in a time loop, where they are hunted and killed unless they survive until dawn. Video game-inspired horror, starring Ella Rubin, Michael Cimino and Odessa Azion

programme.title: The Nun (2018)
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun discover a religious orders terrible secret and battle a malevolent force while investigating the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun. Fifth instalment in The Conjuring Universe horror saga, starring Taissa Farmiga and Demián Bichir

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. Members of a Satanic cult have their eyes on the antique toy, and break into their house to prepare a ritual that will transform the harmless plaything into a terrifying monster. Horror spin-off from The Conjuring, starring Annabelle Wallis and Ward Horton

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)

programme.desc: Two parents do whatever it takes to keep their children safe in a world full of creatures hunting every sound they hear. programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)

Horror prequel, starring Lupita Nyongo, Joseph Quinn and Alex Wolff

programme.desc: Decades since the rage virus took hold, the survivors live on a small island. Danny Boyles horror thriller sequel, starring Jodie Comer, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ralph Fiennes and Rocco Haynes

programme.desc: The sheriff of a quiet little town investigates a series of unexpected murders, trying to work out what could have driven seemingly normal, well-adjusted people to kill. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The hundreds of gigantic lines, some in the shape of animals, geometric patterns and even an alien-like being, that extend for several miles throughout a remote Peruvian desert. Known as the Nazca Lines, some theorists believe the markings have an extraterrestrial connection, and that the ancient people of the region possibly created these figures in tribute to the gods who visited them

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate mysterious beings with big heads and eyes, whose images were found carved into rocks. Known as the greys, they are rumoured to be alien life forms

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians Sphinx and pyramids, questioning whether extra-terrestrial help was utilised to complete the structures

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. He begins with a towpath exploration of industrial engineering along the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Setting off from Liverpool, he takes a three-day walk inland to Wigan, ending at the towns iconic pier as he traces the story of the waterways chaotic construction and its impact on the development of Lancashire

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The Norman Invasion: The Battle of Hastings
programme.desc: Presenters Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks continue their look at how weapons and body armour were developed, investigating the part played by Danish battle axes, Saxon shields and Norman lances during the Battle of Hastings in 1066

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Delving into the mysteries surrounding the death of Elvis Presley in 1977, investigating the theories that he remained alive, secretly, for some time afterwards

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.title: Life After People

programme.title: History of Weapons

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII
programme.desc: In September 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. By September 6, the citys anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The Napoleonic Wars: The Battle of Waterloo 1815
programme.desc: Kevin Hicks and Karl Ude-Martinez test a cannon, grenade and Brown Bess musket as they explore what it was like to face a Napoleonic charge

programme.title: Curse of the Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals how archaeologists are shedding light on one of historys most mysterious periods. For 300 years after the collapse of Rome, Saxons and Vikings rampaged through Europe. However, these pagan societies then seemed to disappear. From new discoveries of Viking settlements and burials in Scandinavia, to the last stand of paganism against Christendom in Poland, Alice reveals the catastrophes, calamities and disasters which helped shape modern Europe

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Custom car builder James West buys Mikes Willys Jeep to create a Second World War bomber-themed truck for a client, but theres a catch - the price of the truck will be determined by the winner of a Shop Truck Challenge. Egos flare across Rust Valley as the teams prepare for the race

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: American couple and civil rights activists Betty and Barney Hill, who claimed they were abducted by extraterrestrials in a rural area of New Hampshire in September 1961. What really happened to the hills that night? Was this a real case of aliens among us or a couple just looking for attention?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Broadhaven is a sleepy community in south-west Wales, but since the late 1970s it has made headlines for being the UFO capital of Europe. In 1977, schoolchildren spotted a cigar-shaped aircraft. The sighting transforms the quiet seaside town into a UFO hot spot

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Examining how a huge force of water would affect an unpopulated planet, with the Sydney Opera House collapsing and famous paintings being destroyed

programme.title: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: How influential and powerful people try to spread their own truth by any means. In war, the battlefield serves as a stage for heroic narratives. The enemy mutates from a human being into a monster. Lies serve to justify bloodshed and to disguise the facts

programme.title: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Time and again, faith is also misused as a political tool as wars and conflicts are often fought under the guise of religion. Rudolph Herzog analyses how faith has been functionalised for worldly interests throughout history

programme.title: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Money plays a decisive role in the battle between truth and lies. Whether art and culture, science or politics, nothing seems to be safe from the power of money and the influence of those who possess it

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: As the Titanic started to sink in April 1912, another ship came into view, offering her passengers the hope of being rescued. However, despite a fusillade of rockets, the ship turned away. Within two hours, 1,500 people were dead. An American investigation at the time accused the SS Californian, even though the freighter was stationary that night. A British inquiry concurred, keen to shift blame from national failures on lifeboat provision and steamship supervision. However, since Titanics wreck was discovered, the mystery began to unlock, and now, with recently discovered clues, a new suspect has emerged: the SS Mount Temple. This documentary follows a range of experts, using the latest investigative tools, as they examine these new clues and revisit the evidence from 1912 to take a fresh look at the cold case of the 20th century

It later emerges that Graham is wanted in connection with his wifes murder, and Danny, Chin Ho and Kono investigate the case when he protests his innocence

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Three men are shot in the neighbourhood where Hondo used to live and the only witness is the troubled teenage son of his old friend Leroy, who is now behind bars

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An evening drive becomes a sobering experience for one driver and a man struggles to correctly carry out a drugs test

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Bystanders call out police to deal with an erratic driver, an unlicensed driver tries to push his luck and a man is fined on the way home from the store

programme.title: Mornings
programme.desc: All the big stories of the morning plus news making interviews, analysis and eyewitness reports from around the world.

programme.title: Mornings

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill is knocked unconscious and replaced by an alien double while on a mission - leaving it up to his colleagues to notice the exchange before disaster strikes. Richard Dean Anderson stars

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team investigate the apparent suicide of a Navy intelligence officer who leapt to his death after taking LSD

programme.title: Will and Grace
programme.desc: Jack helps Karen come to terms with her possible pregnancy, while Graces starstruck mother visits and tries to persuade her to marry Will. Comedy, guest starring Debbie Reynolds

programme.title: Will and Grace
programme.sub-title: Big Brother Is Coming - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Wills estranged brother Sam seeks a reconciliation and develops a strong attraction to Grace. Meanwhile, Jack is horrified to learn he is older than he thought. Comedy, guest starring John Slattery (Mad Men) alongside Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and the family set off for a cheap break in Japan, where they get stranded and find themselves forced to take part in a shocking game show to win tickets for the flight home. Featuring the voice of Star Trek veteran George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa attends a performing arts camp, where guitar-playing counsellors and musically inclined youngsters teach her to embrace her creative side. Meanwhile, Bart and Homer accompany Just the Clown to Norway, where he hopes to collect a Nobel Prize for his contributions to the comedy world. With the guest voices of Jemaine Clement and Bret McKenzie of Flight of the Conchords, and Glee stars Lea Michele, Cory Monteith and Amber Riley

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The team is called when the charred body of a police officer is found in a fire pit. programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team scrambles to find Kensi when she is attacked and kidnapped by a mysterious militia group

programme.title: S.W.A.T.

programme.title: Police 24/7
programme.desc: A car pursuit leads to the arrest of a man detained on suspicion of ditching meth, and officers pull over a man for a DUI for the second night in a row

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: Homer promises Marge that he will become a better parent, and decides to enrol on a fathering enrichment course. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Kareem Abdul Jabbar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santas Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Ryan excludes Michael from a corporate wilderness retreat, so the hapless manager sets off into the woods determined to make his own survival adventure

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Jan decides to sue Dunder Mifflin and Michael is called as a key witness. Kelly gives Pam a lesson in trash talking when Darryl beats Jim at table tennis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes an apprentice to famous magician the Great Raymondo, but trouble brews when she is persuaded to reveal the secret behind her masters most famous trick. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony

programme.desc: Ricky Gervais and Stephen Merchant send their friend and former radio producer Karl Pilkington on a tour of some of the most impressive sites in the world. programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under, where even the smallest mistake could have lethal consequences. Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stuart and Olivia tangle with a carpet python

The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. Big Boy Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.desc: Tanzanias vast Ngorongoro Crater is in many ways a perfect home for wildlife. However, its isolation also threatens their futures

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga sets out to rescue a newly orphaned one-year-old orangutan from a remote village, but when she arrives back at the school, the orphan is found to have a broken wrist. The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. Big Boy Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.desc: Cameras venture underwater with a whitetip reef shark and a pelagic thresher shark as they hunt using heightened senses and killer instincts

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Part one of two. The reasons why young animals enjoy playing, and how it can teach them to survive in the wild. The programme explores how young elephants, which rarely leave their mothers side for the first eight years of life, play to develop social skills, while macaques hone their mental agility by playing games with stones. programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Part two of two. The secrets behind animals group games, from dolphins that play catch to a hyena tug of war, revealing the benefits they gain from their playful behaviour. The programme examines how breaching the rules of a game can have fatal consequences - but how it also presents an opportunity for animals with a rigid hierarchy to break down social barriers

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat (2003)
programme.desc: Two bored youngsters are led on a series of zany misadventures when a manic moggy comes knocking at their door with a magical stovepipe hat on his head and mischief in mind. Comedy fantasy based on the childrens book by Dr Seuss, starring Mike Myers, Alec Baldwin, Dakota Fanning and Spencer Breslin

programme.title: Babe (1995)
programme.desc: A kindly farmer wins a cute piglet, which some greedy humans and jealous animals hope will end up as the Christmas roast. Undaunted, the young pig proves himself useful on the farm and enlists the aid of the resident dog in learning how to herd sheep. Family comedy, starring James Cromwell and Magda Szubanski, with Christine Cavanaugh, Miriam Margolyes and Hugo Weaving among those providing the voices of the animal characters

programme.title: The Witches (1990)
programme.desc: A boy goes on holiday with his grandmother to a seaside hotel hosting a convention of witches, who have come together to hear their leaders plan to turn all the children in England into mice. When the chief hag discovers the young lad eavesdropping at their meeting, she decides to make him one of her first victims. Childrens fantasy directed by Nicolas Roeg, based on the book by Roald Dahl, and starring Anjelica Huston, Mai Zetterling, Jasen Fisher, Jane Horrocks, Rowan Atkinson and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Smurfs (2025)
programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads her fellow blue creatures on a mission to the real world to save him. Live-action animated musical fantasy comedy, featuring the voices of Rihanna, James Corden and Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (2005)
programme.desc: Penniless Charlie Bucket is one of five lucky children who find a golden ticket in a chocolate bar, winning a once-in-a-lifetime tour of eccentric recluse Willy Wonkas magical sweet company. Unfortunately, the other winners each face a grim fate when they start to misbehave. Tim Burtons childrens fantasy, based on Roald Dahls novel, starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, Helena Bonham Carter, and Deep Roy playing all the Oompa Loompas

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Harriet the Spy (1996)
programme.desc: A precocious youngsters diary falls into the wrong hands and its contents are made public knowledge, prompting those featured in its pages to plot their revenge for the things she has written about them and forcing her to set the record straight. Family comedy, based on Louise Fitzhughs novel, starring Michelle Trachtenberg, Vanessa Lee Chester, Gregory Smith and Rosie ODonnell

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz (1939)
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Setting out to find the wizard who can show her a way home, she is joined on her journey by a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who all hope their own wishes will be granted. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Shrek (2001)
programme.desc: Anti-social ogre Shrek resolves to stop an evil ruler from banishing fairy-tale characters to his swampland home. However, the reluctant hero ends up forced to rescue the beautiful Princess Fiona from a castle guarded by a dragon, aided only by a wisecracking donkey. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the childrens books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: True Blood
programme.sub-title: Whatever I Am, You Made Me
programme.desc: Debbies parents arrive in Bon Temps to investigate the disappearance of their daughter, and their arrival places Sookie on edge as she struggles to bring Tara back to her senses. Authority council members Roman and Salome enlist a new ally, and a reunion with his old high-school teacher leaves Jason feeling conflicted

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill and Eric struggle to balance their hunt for the escaped Russell Edgington with the demands of the Vampire Authority. Roman and Salome discover there is a Sanguinista traitor among the Chancellors, and Pam intervenes when Tara comes up with an inventive way to achieve her true death. Meanwhile, Jason uncovers a secret about his parents fate after stumbling upon a hidden fairy burlesque club, and Sookie turns to alcohol as she tries to cope with her guilt. Supernatural drama, starring Stephen Moyer and Alexander Saarsgard

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A high-speed chase through the streets of London ensues when Christine Johnson and the military invade the ARC in search of a mysterious artefact. Forced to take refuge in an old hut in the woods, Abby, Sarah and the teams sense of safety is short-lived when an anomaly opens nearby and they find themselves besieged by giant terror birds. Elsewhere, Jack faces trouble of a different kind when he hosts a game of poker. Hannah Spearritt, Laila Rouass and Robert Lowe star

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A wounded dinosaur, a dracorex, appears when an anomaly opens in the middle of a car breakers yard. Just as the team is trying to force it back, a medieval knight gallops through the portal, chasing what he believes to be a dragon. While Becker, Abby, Danny and Connor split up to pursue the dangerous beast and the fierce warrior, Sarah seizes the opportunity to step back in time. Hannah Spearritt and Laila Rouass star

programme.desc: The Homestead comes under attack, sending Wynonna and Doc after Peacemaker. Nicole faces mystical consequences. Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano

Lafayette is menaced by gruesome visions of his dead lover Jesus, and Tara bonds with Jessica as she starts work at Fangtasia. Meanwhile, Terry and Patrick encounter an old war buddy, who reveals they were cursed during their tour of duty in Iraq

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: The Authority councillors manage to salvage Bill and Erics bungled attempt to capture Russell Edgington, and as the former king awaits execution, the loyalists prepare for the fulfilment of a vampire prophecy. Pam continues to bond with Tara, and Alcide decides to take action as the gang of vigilantes targeting supernaturals strikes again. Meanwhile, Jason takes Sookie to the fairy burlesque club, where she discovers the truth about their parents death

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Jack sets out to uncover the truth about his sisters job, but soon finds himself under attack from a Megopteran, a huge carnivorous insect-like futuristic creature. Seeking refuge in a race car at a test track, he inadvertently drives it straight through an anomaly and into the future - leaving Abby and the team with little choice but to launch a perilous mission to save him. Hannah Spearritt stars

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Abby and Sarah race to save a civilian who is trapped in a tent when an anomaly opens at a campsite and releases a herd of embolotherium - rhinoceros-type beasts from the Eocene. Danny arrives with a mysterious woman from the future who seems to have the power to stop the stampede, but the team discovers she has a dark secret. Jason Flemyng, Hannah Spearritt and Laila Rouass star

programme.title: Wynonna Earp
programme.desc: The gang races to save one of its own, but is hindered by unseen forces. Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of experts visit Craig-y-Nos Castle, which was once a TB hospital and later became the estate of opera singer Adelina Patti. The star supposedly haunts the building, and playing the song Home Sweet Home is said to summon the ghost

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Bailte
programme.desc: Síle Nic Chonaonaigh visits An Baile Riabhach, a townland just west of Dingle in Co. Kerry. Here she meets the locals, many of whom are descendants of the people who moved into the area through the Land Commission schemes of the 1950s. She meets Toose Mac Gearailt, a man with an extraordinary knowledge of the Irish language and a source of countless unusual words, many now out of use. programme.title: Caomhnoirí na Talún
programme.desc: Across the countryside recent years have seen catastrophic declines of birds, wild bees and native plants. Even once common birds like the skylark and kestrel are now in trouble. The intensification of farming and forestry is seen as one of the most significant contributors to these losses, but if biodiversity is to improve that change will happen across Irish farmland. This documentary follows five farmers as they farm with nature, as they create or conserve habitats on their farms, pioneer new ideas and try to protect wildlife and their living

Plus, the trio harvest their strawberries

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock, Flo Headlam and the team are in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, to help Gareth and Rob transform their boring garden into a Mediterranean-themed social space on an £8,000 budget

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson continues to transform his childhood garden into a haven for wildlife. Rain finally arrives and the garden is transformed - ponds burst with dragonflies and damselflies, meadows explode in flower and the much-awaited hum of life can be heard everywhere. Colin Stafford-Johnson encounters his first nest of the year, a real milestone for the project and he explores the life cycle of the much overlooked solitary bees

programme.title: Edwardian Farm

programme.title: Death Train (1993)
programme.desc: A mercenary is hired to transport a nuclear device across Europe and get it to Iraq without arousing the suspicions of the undercover cops looking for him - little suspecting that a crack team of special agents, led by Pierce Brosnan, is closing in. Clumsy thriller which only manages to deliver in the closing scenes, also starring Patrick Stewart, Alexandra Paul, Christopher Lee and Ted Levine

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Originally from India, Bindu grew up with a garden full of vegetables, nature and birdsong and would like to recreate a bit of that in her modest garden in Warrington, Cheshire. The garden is a sun trap, so she and partner Vivek want some height and shade in the plot as well as raised beds for fruit and veg growing. Its very important to them that they try and care for the environment too so would like the means to harvest rainwater and compost waste. With a relatively small budget of £3,000, Charlie Dimmock and Lee Hull create a garden that is both eco-friendly and looks beautiful

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: It is July and Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman face their busiest period of the year as harvest arrives. The team brings in the cherries with the help of the Dartmoor pony, Ruth tries her hand at salmon netting, and Alex and Peter struggle to save their potato crop from being wiped out by plant disease. There is also time to relax after all the hard work with a day out at the seaside, featuring musical entertainment, new-fangled swimming costumes and a Punch and Judy show

programme.desc: A mum stays at home to care for five children all under the age of four; a heated dispute between her husband and his mum makes matters worse.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: When a Slovakian womans Visa application is denied, she sues small business owners for allegedly scamming her with a thousand-dollar application process.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A short-lived romance ends with a woman receiving a $2,900 car from her lover the same month she breaks up with him.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: When an electricity bill reaches the thousands, an engaged gay couple take a family member to court; the foreclosed home goes up in smoke.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: Years after David Clarkes death, a confession tape reveals a betrayal between feuding neighbours in the UK.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Abraham Shakespeare becomes a local celebrity in Lakeland, Florida, after winning the lottery. However, receiving hundreds of calls a day with requests for money gets too much.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: During a winter storm in New York, a wife and mother is found brutally murdered in her bedroom. Detectives desperately search outside the home for clues.

programme.title: Britains Almost Perfect Murders
programme.desc: Emile Cilliers tries twice to murder his wife, first with a gas leak, then by sabotaging her parachutes, until her survival exposes the plot.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1978, the body of 16-year-old Krisann Baxter is found in Washington. Investigators try to find Krisanns killer, but dont find any answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1989, Krista Martins life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades.
